title: Thyroid follow-up

red_flags.text: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.
red_flags.rationale: Defines chronic laboratory and medication-document verification in DHA telehealth and its setting limitations.

investigations.evidence_extract: Specifies clinician review of TSH, free T4, and T3 over time and notes adherence or symptoms as reasons for earlier testing.

source_limitations: The source does not provide a complete symptom, examination, or red-flag workflow for thyroid follow-up.
The baseline workflow is setting-agnostic and broader than DHA telehealth laboratory monitoring.
Medication adjustments remain clinician-entered and unsupported by this item mapping.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
